headline: AT&T’s US$250b Network Plan And What It Could Mean For Valuation
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has committed to invest more than $250b over the next five years in its U.S. network. The plan targets fiber, 5G, wireless, and satellite connectivity across urban, suburban, and rural areas. The company also highlighted goals around network resilience, security, workforce development, and public sector collaboration. AT&T enters this investment cycle with its shares at $27.71 and a mixed recent performance, including a 12.8% gain year to date and an 11.2% return over the past...

headline: Scotiabank Lifts AT&T (T) Price Target after Positive Industry Signals
summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 9, Scotiabank raised its price recommendation on AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) to $31 from $29.50. The firm reiterated a Sector Perform rating on the shares. After hosting its annual TMT conference, the firm said AT&T offered some encouraging signals […]
